name: influencer-match-skill
description: Match products with optimal influencer profiles based on category alignment, audience demographics, engagement rate, and ROI estimation.
author: alphaparkinc

product_category.description: Product category (e.g. beauty, fitness, tech, food, fashion).

target_audience.description: Target audience profile with age_range, gender, interests.

budget_usd.description: Total influencer marketing budget in USD.

matches.description: Ranked list of influencer profile matches with fit scores and ROI estimates.

budget_allocation.description: Recommended budget split across influencer tiers.
